title: LLM provider selection, cost estimation and governance policy
acceptance: Model selection per task (strategy, generation, analysis)
Cost estimation before executing expensive tasks
Admin policy: authorized providers, models, max spend

history.description: Task status reconciled to ready: dependencies and conflicts are clear for execution
